# Liatrio Daily Lead Research — 2026-05-25\n\nPaste everything below into Claude and ask it to research contacts.\n\n---\n\nI work at Liatrio, an enterprise AI and DevOps transformation consultancy. We help large enterprises with: Enterprise AI enablement, DevOps transformation, platform engineering, application modernization (cloud-native), cloud migration, security & compliance (DevSecOps), and workforce enablement/coaching.\n\nBelow are today's top 10 target companies based on trigger events that signal they may need Liatrio's services. For EACH company, please:\n\n1. Search LinkedIn and Google for 5-10 contacts at the company who would be the right decision-makers or influencers for Liatrio's offerings (CIO, CTO, VP of Engineering, Director of Platform Engineering, Director of DevOps, Head of Cloud, Enterprise Architect, etc.)\n2. For each contact, provide: Name, Title, LinkedIn URL\n3. Write a short personalized outreach message referencing the trigger event\n\n---\n\n## #1: CAE Inc (Signal Score: 21)\n\n**Liatrio Service Fit:** DevOps & Platform Engineering\n**Suggested Angle:** Liatrio builds internal developer platforms that accelerate delivery. Offer a DevOps maturity assessment.\n\n**Trigger Events:**\n- [DevOps & Platform Engineering] RegScale Recognized in the 2026 Gartner® Market Guide for DevOps Continuous Compliance Automation Tools - Yahoo Finance\n  Source: Yahoo Finance | https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMirAFBVV95cUxOTjhjQ1doVnVEamNGTHlMTzY4V2kyTDI1dW9DLU00SW1JRmhmZlRWRzBBTk5BcGlwMk9rUWxEdGk3VHBBOHQ3TkpZY0ZjNEpZRURqYmdSel9KUzhuU0pmSzRJUUxad2FkOEk1SG1JSDl3ekRFVkJRdlJ1Sy1iYzNTemZ6akhPdm5WbUw0SEZueHBfMjZhc1RaTXN2QTVDWElYWVUtZE5hYUd6VUJ3?oc=5\n- [Enterprise AI] Mirantis OpenStack for Kubernetes Adds AI Assistant for Documentation and Operational Guidance for High Performance Workloads - Yahoo Finance\n  Source: Yahoo Finance | https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiqgFBVV95cUxPaWEwS3BpTWJ5V3U0aHhrcnJURTNZcjhkSEE3SEo2YnhyS0lLRHZ2aXZyUmhBWkgzTXNWY2ZHQ1Y5bElUMkJZWTVXZWpTOFNVdnBMNjNqNnF5ZGtmZ3RaWktsd1Z5VDZOb3NHRUtnWjd6UkNRQm5md0lmVS0zZ3lQeHhpZ3dKaS1hLXVNWU8zZTNsM05nbEZlaU5uTEl1dVNmUjdSYlNSaTlvUQ?oc=5\n- [Strategic Signal] Sterling Infrastructure (STRL): A Beneficiary of AI Expansion Strategy - Yahoo Finance\n  Source: Yahoo Finance | https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMirAFBVV95cUxNb0Z1Tjh3OWFMZEJ5REdPa0ZxbUVuM0hzbjZnR2hnOGhXWVZ6VnljWjVVUW81QzlRaUdEeGxibE1iaFZUTno5VTJCQmtici16MXNURVpyZGlUeW1WVEdQbVVFUWRzR2thLWFVY2ZDU004X202UjNOdTVxWWZ3U3JLZmgwVFNNc0oyZTZBMlR3TUszSGd4V2xud19tenZQVXRiYmJJSWlfazJJR0NE?oc=5\n- [Enterprise AI] Is BigBear.ai's Generative AI Pivot Fueling Quality Revenue Mix?
